categories.name: General icons
guidelines-aliases: Do not use to reflect sustainability. See the [Responsible marketing guidelines](https://brand.se.com/content/responsible-marketing).
Do not use to represent security. Use icons from the "Security and danger" group instead.
Do not use to represent protection. Use icons from the "Protection" group instead.

groups.name: Alerts-Notifications
groups.description: Pictograms representing alerts, alarms and notifications

icons.name: bell
guidelines: Do not use to represent alarm. Use the "siren-waves", "fire-siren", "person-running-bag-signal-waves", "person-running-fire", or "person-running-horizontal-line" icons instead.
